name: C2xGetTokenString
title: C2xGetTokenString
syntax: long C2xGetTokenString( long packet, char protocolDesignator[], char tokenDesignator[], long bufferSize, char buffer[] );
description: This function copies characters from the token and adds a terminating \0.

parameters.name: packet
parameters.description: Handle of a packet that has been created with C2xInitPacket

return:
Number of copied characters or 0
With C2xGetLastError you can check if the function has been processed successfully.

description: Node System - PreStart in CAPL Browser
